assessor_results.critic_raw: The task prompt is incomplete. It cuts off at '[rest of design_narrative]' after establishing only the data source (four years of ED encounters), the linkage strategy (triage records to ADT and bed-management outcomes), and the prediction time point (completion of initial triage assessment). There is no methodology to evaluate: no model architecture, no outcome definition, no feature set, no train/test split strategy, no evaluation metrics, and no stated hypothesis. Rendering a verdict on a partial sentence would require me to manufacture a methodology to critique, which would not be a valid critique of anything the author actually claims.
